breakdown.creativeCore: Historical Figure Social Media Mockup：Generates a dark-mode social media post mockup featuring a historical figure with custom text, profile details, and a multi-image attachment grid.
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 直播带货界面、社交电商、移动端商品页

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a UI/界面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: wide shot, grid]。

Visual style:
[媒介/渲染方式/审美方向/色彩系统]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
